name: Card Metric
description: A grid of metric cards showing a data stats with icons and trend indicators.

name: Card Data
description: A grid of data cards showing a data table with icons and status indicators.

name: Card Data Horizontal
description: A horizontal row of icon-based data points with title, subtitle, and optional status badge.

name: Card Data Media
description: A grid of media thumbnails, such as CCTV feeds, with a title and live status indicator.

name: Card Greeting
description: A personalized welcome banner with an avatar, time-of-day greeting, and summary line.

name: Card Score Gauge
description: A semicircular gauge card showing a score out of a max value with a color-coded status band.

name: Card Metric with Line
description: A metric card pairing a value and trend badge with an inline sparkline chart.

name: Button
description: A primary action button with a built-in loading spinner state.

name: Weather Card
description: A compact weather readout with a condition icon, temperature, and humidity.

name: Input
description: A styled text input with a focus ring and disabled state.

name: Search Input
description: A search input with autocomplete suggestions, keyboard navigation, and highlighted matches.

name: Tabs
description: Simple tabs for switching between different views or sections.

name: Dropdown Image
description: Dropdown list for selecting an option with image.

name: Dropdown
description: Dropdown list for selecting an option.

name: Modal
description: A confirmation dialog with overlay backdrop, escape-to-close, and OK/Cancel actions.

name: Table
description: A history table with date, type, location, amount, status, and operator columns.

name: Pie chart
description: A donut chart with a center total and a color-coded legend of category shares.

name: Line chart
description: An area line chart with gridlines and monthly/half-yearly/yearly time-range tabs.

name: Bar chart
description: A bar chart with hover value tooltips and total, average, and peak summary stats.
